structured_failed_tool_examples: bash ls scripts/build_evolution_dashboard.py 2>&1 && python3 scripts/build_evolution_dashboard.py 2>&1 | tail -40: Exit code: 2. Tip: use explicit paths (./script.sh, not script.sh) and -- to separate flags from positional args.

bash grep -n 'trap\|EXIT\|exit\|timeout\|cancelled\|cancel\|SIGTERM\|SIGINT' scripts/evolve.sh | head -50: Exit code: 141. Tip: use explicit paths (./script.sh, not script.sh) and -- to separate flags from positional args.

bash grep -n 'ModelCall\|model_call\|model_completion\|completion_without' src/state.rs | grep -i 'pair\|match\|orphan\|abandon\|without\|missing\|incomplete' | head -20: Exit code: 1. Tip: use explicit paths (./script.sh, not script.sh) and -- to separate flags from positional args.

bash sed -n '$(grep -n "^NORMAL_MODEL_COMPLETION_STATUSES" scripts/log_feedback.py | head -1 | cut -d: -f1),+10p' scripts/log_feedback.py: Exit code: 1. Tip: use explicit paths (./script.sh, not script.sh) and -- to separate flags from positional args.

bash grep -rn 'ModelCallStarted\|ModelCallCompleted' --include='*.sh' scripts/ | head -20: Exit code: 1. Tip: use explicit paths (./script.sh, not script.sh) and -- to separate flags from positional args.

bash grep -n 'completion_without_start\|unmatched_completed' scripts/build_evolution_dashboard.py | head -10: Exit code: 141. Tip: use explicit paths (./script.sh, not script.sh) and -- to separate flags from positional args.

bash sed -n '$(grep -n "^def event_run_id" scripts/build_evolution_dashboard.py | head -1 | cut -d: -f1),+15p' scripts/build_evolution_dashboard.py: Exit code: 1. Tip: use explicit paths (./script.sh, not script.sh) and -- to separate flags from positional args.

bash sed -n '$(grep -n "^def event_run_id" scripts/build_evolution_dashboard.py | head -1 | cut -d: -f1),+15p' scripts/build_evolution_dashboard.py: Exit code: 1. Tip: use explicit paths (./script.sh, not script.sh) and -- to separate flags from positional args.

top_lessons.action: replace stale tasks during planning or land a small verification/docs improvement instead of analysis-only work
top_lessons.fingerprint: implementation found the selected task was already satisfied or stale

top_lessons.action: validate seeded tasks against the fresh assessment before implementation and replace contradicted seeds
top_lessons.fingerprint: seeded task was contradicted by fresh assessment evidence
